# Arithmetic → Add and Subtract

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Arithmetic → Add and Subtract

Add and Subtract

Instruction Type and Width                  Instruction description
                                            Performs two additions and two subtractions. Each addition and
                                            subtraction is between the same two sources. The sum and
Vector Add and Subtract 16-bit Word Parts   difference are stored in the destination registers. The sources
                                            are 16-bit and the results are 16-bit wide and are packed into a
                                            32-bit or 40-bit destination.
